page_metadata.bioconda__summary: Transcriptome assembly and differential expression analysis for RNA-Seq.
page_metadata.biocontainers__summary: Cufflinks assembles transcripts and estimates their abundances in rna-seq samples. it accepts aligned rna-seq reads and assembles the alignments into a parsimonious set of transcripts. cufflinks then estimates the relative abundances of these transcripts based on how many reads support each one.
page_metadata.biotools__summary: Cufflinks assembles transcripts and estimates their abundances in RNA-Seq samples. It accepts aligned RNA-Seq reads and assembles the alignments into a parsimonious set of transcripts. Cufflinks then estimates the relative abundances of these transcripts based on how many reads support each one.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: Cufflinks assembles transcripts and estimates their abundances in RNA-Seq samples. It accepts aligned RNA-Seq reads and assembles the alignments into a parsimonious set of transcripts. Cufflinks then estimates the relative abundances of these transcripts based on how many reads support each one.
